BancaForteStore.title: Banca Forte Store Document
BancaForteStore.description: State documents stored in the main banca_forte_store collection, representing modular segments of the platform configuration, records, and statistics.

value.description: The main payload containing arrays or configuration dictionaries for predictions, users, settings, bingos, or notifications.

/banca_forte_store/{documentId}.description: The primary administrative collection containing global data models (predictions, readySlips, users, notifications, finance, bingos, settings) synced securely from the server.
